refnamediv.refpurpose: Returns TRUE if a 2D float precision bounding box (BOX2DF) is contained into another 2D float precision bounding box.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: The @ operator returns TRUE if the 2D bounding box A is contained into the 2D bounding box B, using float precision. This means that if A (or B) is a (double precision) box2d, it will be internally converted to a float precision 2D bounding box (BOX2DF)

note.para: This operand is intended to be used internally by BRIN indexes, more than by users.

refsection.para: Availability: 2.3.0 support for Block Range INdexes (BRIN) was introduced.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT ST_MakeBox2D(ST_Point(2,2), ST_Point(3,3)) @ ST_MakeBox2D(ST_Point(0,0), ST_Point(5,5)) AS is_contained;
is_contained -------------- t (1 row)
